message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

actor User
participant "JobManager" as JobManager <<control>> #lightblue
box "" #LightBlue
  participant Process/Application\nas PA \n<<process>>\n#white
end box
database ESDM #lightgray
participant PostProcessing\nas PP \n<<loop>>\n#lightgreen
storage StorageSystem\nas SS \ndatabase #pink
actor Observer


==Observer == 
activate Observer
PP ->>SS : collects observations  
note right of SS:(may write directly)   
ESDM <- -User:write observation t    
PA->> ESMD :(transform for efficiency)\nread container for observationt 

==Simulation Runs==     
deactivate observer       
jobmanager --> pa   periodically submit job(IN=t, OUT=y); allocates resourcesand calls; read IN=x ; compute async out =y return result multiple iterations finalize files become visible user receives output notification end process application esdm post processing storage system finalise 


@enduml
